case_title: PETER MUHAWIEH VS. VICTOR A SOLORZANO ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-07-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WANTS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCREASE THE AMOUNT OF HIS CLAIM. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST IRMA SOLARZANO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR A. SOLORZANO WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PETER MUHAWIEH & DEFENDANT VICTOR A. SOLORZANO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT IRMA PINEDA, A/K/A IRMA F. SOLORZANO. TODD KENNEDY WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE, BUT DEFENDANT SOLORZANO WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT. CLAIM DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT IRMA PINEDA, A/K/A IRMA F. SOLORZANO. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KENNEDY, C. TODD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR MUHAWIEH, PETER

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUHAWIEH, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLORZANO, VICTOR A $2,333.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,383.00, PLAINTIFF CLAIMS RENT AND DAMAGE TO PROPERTY AMOUNTING TO $7,333.00 AND HOLDS DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT AMOUNTING TO $5,000.00, THE DIFFERENCE IS $2,333.00, THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST IRMA PINEDA, A/K/A IRMA E. SOLORZANO IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2016 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. VICTOR A. SOLORZANO DOES NOT OWE PETER MUHAWIEH ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JULY 7, 2016. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MUHAWIEH, PETER TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT SOLORZANO, VICTOR A RESPONDENT TAKES NOTHING FROM APPELLANT. APPELLANT TAKES NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, August 25, 2016 in Department 525:
C. Todd Kennedy, Esq., (415-664-8851) for Respondent/Plaintiff Peter Muhawieh who is also present.
Christine Tour-Sarkissian and Assistant counsel Abigail M. Morris, Esq., (415-626-7744) for Appellant/Defendant Victor A. Solorzano who is also present with witness Patricio Lopez.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.
Open statement presented by Mr. Kennedy on behalf of respondent and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - various exhibits: notice of intended witnesses, 10/29/2014 quitclaim deed, commercial lease, 5/2/16 e-mail from Mr. Muhawieh to Kennedy, 12/7/2015 30 day notice of termination of lease.

Open statement presented by Ms. Tour-Sarkissian on behalf of Victor A. Solorzano and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - 2/8/16 & 3/2/16 e-mails, photo copy DMV license, 3/4/16 police report, 12/7/15 termination letters, 12/31/2015 closed business.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
